description: Legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. The parnas and shammash Elʿazar b. Hillel comes before the court with an unbound Torah codex, and Yosef b. Yefet known as al-Ra[..]āṣī is present as well with a copy of the Prophets with interlinear targum. The precise conditions are missing, but mentions sums of 110 wariq dirhams, 90 wariq dirhams, and a stipulation that someone will keep the Prophets codex with him for the sake of study for a period of one year. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
